title: Add a TypeScript Lambda Function to a project
description: Add a TypeScript Lambda Function to a project

project.description: The project to add the lambda function to
project.x-prompt: Select the project to add the lambda function to

name.description: The name of the function to add
name.x-prompt: What name would you like your Lambda Function to have? i.e: MyFunction

functionPath.description: Optional subdirectory within the project source directory to add the function to
functionPath.x-prompt: Enter the path within the project source directory to add the function to (e.g. 'lambda-functions/')

event.description: Optional event source schema to use for the lambda function
event.x-prompt: Enter the event source schema to use for the lambda function

infra.description: The type of infrastructure to deploy your Lambda function with.
infra.x-prompt: What infrastructure would you like to deploy your Lambda function with?

iac.description: The preferred IaC provider. By default this is inherited from your initial selection.
iac.x-prompt: Which provider would you like to manage your infrastructure? (default: inherit)

preferInstallDependencies.description: Whether to prefer installing dependencies after the generator runs. Set to false to defer installing when batching multiple generators (an install still runs if needed so subsequent generators can compute the Nx project graph); install once at the end.
